title: Contact Me - Michael Wheeler
meta_description: Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles
text_excerpt: Contact Me - Michael Wheeler Skip to main content Michael Wheeler Member of Parliament for Worsley & Eccles Join Get Involved Donate About Michael How Can I Help You Personal Casework Contact Me My Work In Worsley & Eccles Constituency Surgery Information Upcoming Events Latest News In Parliament Committees APPGs Visiting Parliament More Search Search the website Search Menu Contact Me If you’re a constituent and would like to get in touch – whether it’s to raise an issue, ask a question, or request support – you’re very welcome to contact me. You can email michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk or call 0161 768 4134. My team and I are here to help and will do our best to respond as quickly as possible. When getting in touch, please include your full name, address, postcode, and any relevant reference numbers. This helps us deal with your enquiry more efficiently. Please note that I can only assist with matters raised by residents of my constituency. If you’re unsure whether I’m your MP, you can check by visiting here and entering your postcode. Michael Wheeler Contact details Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW '> View on Google Maps Email: michael.wheeler.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Jennifer Gregory on behalf of Michael Wheeler, both of Suite 10, Moorfield House, 2a Moorside Road, Worsley, M27 0EW ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
